title: Saudi Arabian Masarepa Fritters
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish made with crispy fritters and a side of tangy briny sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the Masarepa, water, and salt. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the fritters to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of briny sauce.
For the briny sauce, combine the Briny, Arabian spice blend, and water in a bowl. Mix well.
